name: openclaw-feishu-collaboration-spec
description: OpenClaw plugin: passive group transcript capture, mention-based reply gate, cross-bot @-back, and graduated loop guard for Feishu/Lark.

scripts.secret-scan: ! grep -RE '(cli_[a-f0-9]{16}|sk-[A-Za-z0-9]{32,}|tp-[a-z0-9]{40,})' src dist 2>/dev/null || (echo 'secrets found, aborting' && exit 1)
scripts.prepublishOnly: npm run secret-scan && npm run build
